data.description: BiosphereState v1.8.0: B_sprout/B_stem/B_fruit/mineral_layer ь╢Фъ░А, succession_phase ьКдь╣╝ыЭ╝
data.label: A_HIGH
data.raw_text:
"""Biosphere state variables тАФ pioneer, organic layer, photosynthetic pools.

Phase 7b: Harsh тЖТ pioneer тЖТ photosynthesis тЖТ O2 тЖТ successional.
Phase 7c: seed тЖТ sprout тЖТ stem тЖТ wood тЖТ fruit (Phase Gate ODE)

All biomass in [kg C/m┬▓] (global average per land area).
ыкиыУа ьаДьЭ┤ыКФ ьЬи(d/dt)ыбЬ ьаХьЭШ, dtыКФ ьаБы╢ДьЧРьДЬ эХЬ ы▓ИызМ ьаБьЪй.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass, field


@dataclass
class BiosphereState:
    """Snapshot of biosphere state for observation / coupling.

    ьГБэГЬы│АьИШ ъ│Дь╕╡:
      Pioneer  : pioneer_biomass, organic_layer, mineral_layer
      ъ┤СэХйьД▒   : B_leaf, B_root (ъ╕░ъ┤А reservoir)
      Phase Gate: B_sprout тЖТ B_stem тЖТ B_wood тЖТ B_fruit тЖТ B_seed (ьГЭьХаьг╝ъ╕░)
    """

    # Pioneer (Phase 7b-1)
    pioneer_biomass: float = 0.0      # [kg C/m┬▓]
    organic_layer: float = 0.0        # [kg C/m┬▓] humus
    mineral_layer: float = 0.0        # [kg/m┬▓]   эТНэЩФ ъ┤Сым╝

    # ъ┤СэХйьД▒ ъ╕░ъ┤А reservoir (Phase 7b-2)
    B_leaf: float = 0.0               # [kg C/m┬▓] ьЮО
    B_root: float = 0.0               # [kg C/m┬▓] ы┐Мыжм

    # Phase Gate ьГЭьХаьг╝ъ╕░ (Phase 7c) тАФ ьФитЖТьЛ╣тЖТьдДъ╕░тЖТыВШым┤тЖТьЧ┤ызд
    B_sprout: float = 0.0             # [kg C/m┬▓] ьЛ╣ (ы░ЬьХД ьзБэЫД ьЬаымШ)
    B_stem: float = 0.0               # [kg C/m┬▓] ьдДъ╕░ (ь┤Иы│╕/ъ┤Аыкй ыЛиъ│Д)
    B_wood: float = 0.0               # [kg C/m┬▓] ыкйы│╕ (ыВШым┤ ыЛиъ│Д)
    B_fruit: float = 0.0              # [kg C/m┬▓] ьЧ┤ызд (ъ▓░ьЛд)
    B_seed: float = 0.0               # [kg C/m┬▓] ьФи (ы▓ИьЛЭ/ьаАьЮе эТА)

    # Fluxes (last step)
    GPP: float = 0.0                  # [kg C/m┬▓/yr]
    Resp: float = 0.0
    NPP: float = 0.0
    transpiration_flux: float = 0.0   # [kg H2O/m┬▓/yr]
    latent_heat_biosphere: float = 0.0  # [W/m┬▓]

    # Phase ьзДэЦЙ ьГБэГЬ (edge AI ьЪФьХ╜ ь╢Ьыае)
    photo_active: bool = False         # True if GPP > 0 this step
    f_O2: float = 0.0                  # O2 limitation factor (0~1)
    succession_phase: float = 0.0      # 0=pioneer, 1=sprout, 2=stem, 3=wood, 4=fruit

    @property
    def total_biomass(self) -> float:
        return (self.B_leaf + self.B_root + self.B_sprout + self.B_stem
                + self.B_wood + self.B_fruit + self.B_seed + self.pioneer_biomass)

    @property
    def plant_biomass(self) -> float:
        """Pioneer ьаЬьЩ╕ ьЛЭым╝ ьГЭь▓┤ыЯЙ."""
        return (self.B_leaf + self.B_root + self.B_sprout
                + self.B_stem + self.B_wood + self.B_fruit + self.B_seed)

    @property
    def veg_cover_fraction(self) -> float:
        """0~1 proxy for vegetation cover (for albedo feedback)."""
        from ._constants import VEG_COVER_SCALE
        import math
        b = self.B_leaf + self.B_stem + self.B_wood
        return 1.0 - math.exp(-VEG_COVER_SCALE * max(0.0, b))
